  "feedback": "The remediation correctly ensures the maxrepeat setting is applied, but the script is incomplete, contains syntax errors, and could be safer and more deterministic.",
  "concerns": [
    "The provided remediation script is truncated and contains an unfinished conditional (\"if LC_AL\") causing a syntax error.",
    "Variable var_password_pam_maxrepeat is set to an empty string, so the resulting config may write an empty value.",
    "The script does not create backups before editing configuration files.",
    "Idempotence is not fully guaranteed due to the malformed removal logic."
  ],
  "suggested_improvements": [
    "Finish and validate the conditional logic or remove it entirely.",
    "Set var_password_pam_maxdesired_??? to a concrete numeric value (e.g., 0 or 2) before writing to the config.",
    "Add backup steps for /etc/security/pwquality.conf and any *.conf.d files before modifying them.",
    "Use consistent, full‑path sed and grep commands with proper flags to reliably remove existing maxrepeat lines.",
    "Document the change with comments and ensure the new line is appended in the correct file."
  ],
  "security_score": 7,
  "best_practices_...": false
}
